nodes.name: 索马里
nodes.summary: 索马里是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联143种鸟类，包括索马里鸵鸟、Eastern crested guinea fowl、Yellow-necked spurfowl等143种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Lamprotornis

nodes.name: White-crowned starling
nodes.summary: The white-crowned starling (Lamprotornis albicapillus) is a species of starling in the family Sturnidae. It is found in Djibouti, Ethiopia, Kenya, and Somalia. References
